Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing Mr. Conor C. McNamara appeared for the Plaintiff to confirm submission of his order.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JOSEPH ANSANELLI, KATHRYN CORRO's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Petitioners Joseph Ansanelli and Kathryn Corro's Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS JOSEPH ANSANELLI, KATHRYN CORRO'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Off calendar. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies in compliance with SF Local Rule 2.7B. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
